class="main-content"> <script>/*<![CDATA[*/class leaflet {
        fixedPath = [];

        constructor(divId = null, params = {}) {
            if (divId !== null && typeof params === 'object') {
                this.init(divId, params);
            }
        }

        featchConfig(params = {}) {
            //default config
            let baseMaps = {
                "Basic": L.mapboxGL({style: 'https://map.searates.com/styles/basic/style.json'}),
                "Grey": L.mapboxGL({style: 'https://map.searates.com/styles/grey/style.json'}),
                "Streets": L.mapboxGL({style: 'https://map.searates.com/styles/streets/style.json'}),
            };
            let config = {
                baseMaps: baseMaps,
                map: {
                    center: [0, 0],
                    zoom: 3,
                    minZoom: 2,
                    maxZoom: 30,
                    maxBounds: [[-90, -720],[90, 720]],
                    zoomControl: false,
                    // scrollWheelZoom: false,
                    worldCopyJump: true,
                    gestureHandling: true,
                    layers: [
                        baseMaps.Grey
                    ]
                },
                zoom: {
                    position: 'bottomright'
                },
                fitBtn: {
                    icon: 'fas fa-location-arrow',
                    position: 'bottomright'
                }
            };

            for (let section in config) {
                for (let mapPar in params[section]) {
                    config[section][mapPar] = params[section][mapPar];
                }
            }

            return config;
        }

        init(divId, params = {}) {

            //if class already contain map, arr divId is not a string
            if (typeof this.map !== 'undefined' || typeof divId !== 'string') {
                return false;
            }

            let config = this.featchConfig(params);

            this.map = L.map(divId, config.map);
            this.map.removeControl(this.map.attributionControl);

            //custom zoom settings btn to bottomrigt;
            if (config.map.zoomControl === false) {
                L.control.zoom({position: config.zoom.position}).addTo(this.map);
            }

            if (typeof L.easyButton === "function")
            {
                let _this = this;
                L.easyButton(config.fitBtn.icon, function () {
                    _this.fitMap();
                },config.fitBtn).addTo(this.map)
            }

            L.control.layers(config.baseMaps).addTo(this.map);
            return true;
        }

        saveElement(el) {
            if (typeof this.elements !== "object") {
                this.elements = [];
            }
            this.elements.push(el);

            return el;
        }

        clearMap() {
            if (typeof this.elements === "object") {
                for (let el in this.elements) {
                    this.elements[el].remove();
                }
            }
            this.elements = [];
            this.fixedPath = []
        }

        fitMap() {
            const minLat = Math.min(...this.fixedPath.map((coord) => coord.lat));
            // Find minimum longitude from all coordinates
            const minLng = Math.min(...this.fixedPath.map((coord) => coord.lng));
            
            // Find maximum latitude from all coordinates
            const maxLat = Math.max(...this.fixedPath.map((coord) => coord.lat));
            
            // Find maximum longitude from all coordinates
            const maxLng = Math.max(...this.fixedPath.map((coord) => coord.lng));
            
            // Buffer value to add padding around the route
            const buffer = 0.5;

            // Create bounding box start point [lat, lng] with buffer
            const boundStart = [minLat - buffer, minLng - buffer];
            
            // Create bounding box end point [lat, lng] with buffer
            const boundEnd = [maxLat + buffer, maxLng + buffer];

            this.map.flyToBounds([boundStart, boundEnd], {maxZoom: 12, animate: true, duration: 0.8, padding: [50, 50], paddingTopLeft: [500, 50]});

            // if (this.elements.length > 0) {
            //     for (let el in this.elements) {
            //         let element = this.elements[el];

            //         if (typeof element._latlng === "object") {
            //             bounds.push(element._latlng);
            //         }
            //         if (typeof element._latlngs === "object") {
            //             for (let cord in element._latlngs) {
            //                 bounds.push(element._latlngs[cord]);
            //             }
            //         }
            //     }
            //     this.map.flyToBounds(bounds, {maxZoom: 12, animate: true, duration: 0.8});
            // }
        }

        floatLatLng(latLng = []) {
            let correctLatLng = [];

            for (let i = 0; i < latLng.length; i++) {
                correctLatLng.push([parseFloat(latLng[i][0]), parseFloat(latLng[i][1])])
            }

            return correctLatLng;
        }

        distBtwVecInOneDem(pointA, pointB) {
            if (pointA === pointB) {
                return 0;
            }

            if (pointA > pointB) {
                return pointA - pointB;
            } else {
                return pointB - pointA;
            }
        }

        fixGeodesicLatLng(oldLatLng) {

            // Latitude: -85 to +85
            // Longitude: -180 to +180
            let latLng = [];
            latLng.push(new L.LatLng(oldLatLng[0][0], oldLatLng[0][1]));

            let latModif = 0;
            let lngModif = 0;

            for (let i = 1; i < oldLatLng.length; i++) {

                //latSwap
                if (this.distBtwVecInOneDem(oldLatLng[i - 1][0], oldLatLng[i][0]) > 85) {
                    latModif = 170;
                } else if (this.distBtwVecInOneDem(oldLatLng[i - 1][0], oldLatLng[i][0]) < -85) {
                    latModif = -170;
                }

                //lngSwap
                if (this.distBtwVecInOneDem(oldLatLng[i - 1][1], oldLatLng[i][1]) > 180) {
                    lngModif = 360;
                } else if (this.distBtwVecInOneDem(oldLatLng[i - 1][1], oldLatLng[i][1]) < -180) {
                    lngModif = -360;
                }

                latLng.push(new L.LatLng(oldLatLng[i][0] + latModif, oldLatLng[i][1] + lngModif));
            }

            return latLng;
        }

        createBrush(name, params) {
            if (typeof this.brush === "undefined") {
                this.brush = {};
            }
            this.brush[name] = params;
        }

        createMarker(name, params) {
            if (typeof this.marker === "undefined") {
                this.marker = {};
            }
            this.marker[name] = params;
        }

        //drawers

        drawLine(LatLng, brush) {
            this.saveElement(L.polyline(LatLng, brush).addTo(this.map));
        }

        drawPath(brushName, path) {
            const antimeridianFixedPoints = this.createAntimeridianFixedPoints(path);
            let latLng = this.fixGeodesicLatLng(this.floatLatLng(antimeridianFixedPoints));
            this.fixedPath = latLng;
            this.drawLine(latLng, this.brush[brushName]);

            let coordOffset = [];
            for (let loCoord in latLng) {
                coordOffset.push(new L.LatLng(latLng[loCoord].lat, latLng[loCoord].lng - 360));
            }
            this.drawLine(coordOffset, this.brush[brushName]);
            coordOffset = [];
            for (let loCoord in latLng) {
                coordOffset.push(new L.LatLng(latLng[loCoord].lat, latLng[loCoord].lng + 360));
            }
            this.drawLine(coordOffset, this.brush[brushName]);
        }

        drawMarker(markerName, latLng, title, text) {
            this.saveElement(L.marker(latLng, this.marker[markerName]).bindTooltip(title, {
                // permanent: true,
                opacity: 0.85,
                direction: 'bottom'
            }).bindPopup(text).addTo(this.map));
        }

        /**
         * Creates a new array of route points with longitude values adjusted to handle antimeridian crossing
         * @param {Array} routeLatLngs - Array of route points with lat and lng properties
         * @returns {Array} - Array of adjusted route points as [lat, lng] tuples
         */
        createAntimeridianFixedPoints(routeLatLngs) {
            // Initialize empty array to store fixed coordinates
            const fixedLatLngTuple = [];

            // Add the first point without modifications
            fixedLatLngTuple.push(routeLatLngs[0]);

            // Variable to track cumulative longitude adjustment
            let lngModified = 0;
            
            // Iterate through all points starting from index 1
            for (let i = 1; i < routeLatLngs.length; i++) {
                // Extract latitude and longitude from arrays
                const prevLng = routeLatLngs[i - 1][1];
                const currentLat = routeLatLngs[i][0];
                const currentLng = routeLatLngs[i][1];
                
                // Calculate the longitude distance between current and previous point
                const lngDistance = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(Math.abs(prevLng - currentLng), 2));

                // If distance is greater than 180 degrees, we've crossed the antimeridian
                if (lngDistance > 180) {
                // Adjust longitude by 360 degrees in appropriate direction
                lngModified = currentLng > 0 ? -360 : +360;
                }

                // Add point as [lat, lng] array with adjusted longitude
                fixedLatLngTuple.push([currentLat, currentLng + lngModified]);
            }

            // Return array of fixed coordinates
            return fixedLatLngTuple;
        };
    }

    function formatDuration(seconds) {
        const days = Math.floor(seconds / 86400);
        const hours = Math.floor((seconds % 86400) / 3600);
        const minutes = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60);

        if (days > 0) return `${days} days`;
        if (hours > 0) return `${hours} hours`;
        return `${minutes} minutes`;
    }
